title: Final metadata line
description: This object features contextual metadata about the set of security events included in each response and appears on the last line of the response body.

limit.description: Appears if the size limit was reached during data fetch.

offset.description: Identifies the last processed security event in a response. To fetch only those security events that occurred since the last pull, enter this value as an offset parameter.

total.description: The number of security events included in the response.
